title: The Anomaly Rephased
description: Adds a creature that will stalk you and progressively become more aggressive. Not exactly a dweller.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ff7d80dbda9715ac96646e993d6d9afbc6748ab.png)

## Warning! This mod requires GeckoLib!
### 2.0 Beta has released
The Anomaly is the new entity added by the mod, this entity seems to reside mostly in the caves, tormenting anyone who delves deep into them. Stay awake or it might evolve over time. For those who have played this mod before, the anomaly might have changed slightly it's behaviour.

The mod is meant for long playthroughs, you will not encounter the entity during the first days, make sure to make the most of it. The mod is meant to be played without much more knowledge about the entity. I won't respond to most questions about the entity's behavior.

## Sparked Host offers the best deals on servers with incredible hardware! If you want to get an amazing server and support me, [click here!](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3261)
![Sparked Host](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7a2e29055e2ded76430d88e7d08b75b682fb0e3_0.webp)

## **[Sounds were made by Mazellmi](https://youtube.com/@mazellmi?si=2XifIbxP_F-mYXgH) and SCP Containment Breach.**

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b137d09ea5103bb12af4050281ba74cb636d934_0.webp)

# Commands

· "/anomalyconfig (entityspawn/anxietyeffect/crashenabled)": For changing settings that may be annoying. "entityspawn" does not change spawnrate, you can try "/give @p the_anomaly:deathmode_switch" tho.

# [This mod was possible thanks to MCreator!](https://mcreator.net/)
